name: Apricot Granola
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together thoroughly in a large bowl, using your hands:
- 10 cups rolled oats
- 1 tsp salt
- 1 tsp vanilla
- 1/4 cup honey
- 10-oz jar apricot jam
2. Spread the mixture out on a large cookie sheet.
3. Bake at 350°F for about a half hour, stirring every five minutes or so until it's starting to brown.
